In order to provide needed support, please make sure to select correct service category!
If you are encountering any issues with SAP Learning Hub or SAP Certification subscriptions (including exam scheduling issues), please raise a case with Learning Experience - Technical Queries service category.
For queries related to orders or purchases made via sap.com/SAP Store for SAP Learning Hub or SAP Certification exam, two attempts, including invoicing, renewals and cancellations, please reach out to SAP Store team using the following link:
https://store.sap.com/dcp/en/supportform
If you have another related case raised to us, please provide the Case ID number as well.

Please include the following details for consideration by our support agents:
- Customer name/number
- Order ID: 6XXXXXXXX or 5XXXXXXXX
- Your SAP Universal ID
- S/P-User or email address of your authorised admin

Please clearly state your request, including any affected user details and screenshots. One of our agents will be in touch with your shortly.

Please read before creating a case:
- If your certification was completed under an SAP Partner program, please contact the "Partner Service Delivery Team". (To submit your request to the partner support team, first log in. Click the "Get Help" blue icon on the right side, choose "Contact form", Select "User management" & I would like help with option should be, "Certificate Transfer"). Additional information on the login process for the SAP Partner Portal can be found here.
- If you're an individual customer, student, freelancer, please create a ticket in the "SAP Learning help center".

Please include the following details for consideration by our support agents:
- Your SAP Universal ID:
- S/P-User ID:
- Certificate name/code:
- Details of your concern:

Please clearly state your request, including any affected user details and screenshots. One of our agents will be in touch with you shortly.
